prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次依次为约12613名→13253名→12247名→13194名→14102名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年从12247名持续后移至14102名，累计后移 约1855名；2025年基准位次约14102名，为近5年最高（最难进）；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为17人，2026年大幅扩招至36人，增幅约1 12%，为近6年最大扩招幅度；扩招后竞争格局发生显著变化，报考机会增加但位次竞争压力同步上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大 学排名从2021年第113位持续上升至2026年第97位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力与声誉逐年增强；2022年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面（涉及学校管 理舆情），但近年无重大负面事件；抖音热度总排名第63位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；未见投档断档或异常记录，整体报考心理平稳；第五轮学科评 估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生专业以工科为主（计算机、电气、自动化、机械、通信等），与优势学科关联度一般，但工科整体实力在211高校 中处于中上水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024年专业热度显示，电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信（高热推荐，76.86）、计算机类（推荐，67.8）等工科专业热度持续偏高；机械/智能制造（分化观望，52.58）热度一般。北京市考生总数从2021年420 37人持续增长至2025年65434人，2026年进一步增至84900人（+29.7%），考生规模大幅扩大加剧整体竞争；太原理工大学位于山 西省，在北京招生占比极小（历年约17人，占该校全国总招生比例极低）；北京考生对京外211高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，但该校作为山西省唯一211，在华北地区有一定知 名度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14102名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招112%、北京市考生总数增长约29.7%加剧竞争、学校软科排名持续 上升（113→97）增强吸引力等关键因素；预测2026年最低位次约23608名，区间23108–24108名。

- 计算机科学与技术（山西）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校在北京市大幅扩招至36人，位次区间约23108–24108名，建议位次在区间内以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如23000名以 内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如24000名以外）建议优先考虑三档专业确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were approximately 12613 → 13253 → 12247 → 13194 → 14102, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the past three years, it has continuously moved backward from 12247 to 14102, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1855 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 14102, the highest (most difficult to enter) in the past five years. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing was 17 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026 it will significantly expand to 36 students, an increase of about 112%, the largest expansion in the past six years. After the expansion, the competitive landscape changes significantly, with increased application opportunities but also increased ranking competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting the university's continuously improving comprehensive strength and reputation. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving school management public opinion), but there have been no major negative incidents in recent years. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, with a rating of 'average' and moderate short video exposure. No record of application gaps or anomalies has been seen, and overall application psychology is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. The enrollment majors are mainly engineering (computer science, electrical engineering, automation, mechanical engineering, communications, etc.), with average relevance to advantageous disciplines, but the overall engineering strength is at the upper-middle level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, major popularity shows that engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended, 76.86), and Computer Science (recommended, 67.8) continue to have high popularity. Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing (differentiated wait-and-see, 52.58) has average popularity. The total number of examinees in Beijing has grown from 42,037 in 2021 to 65,434 in 2025, and further increased to 84,900 in 2026 (+29.7%), significantly expanding the examinee scale and intensifying overall competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Shanxi Province, with a very small enrollment proportion in Beijing (about 17 students per year, accounting for a very low proportion of the university's total national enrollment). Beijing examinees' willingness to apply to 211 universities outside Beijing is affected by regional preferences, but as the only 211 university in Shanxi Province, it has a certain reputation in North China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on key factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 14102, the 2026 enrollment plan significantly expanding by 112%, the total number of examinees in Beijing increasing by about 29.7% intensifying competition, and the university's Soft Science ranking continuously rising (113→97) enhancing attractiveness, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 23608, with a range of 23108–24108.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Shanxi)
- Computer Science and Technology (Shanxi).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (Shanxi)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Shanxi)
- Applied Physics (Shanxi).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Shanxi)
- Communication Engineering (Shanxi)
- Metallic Materials Engineering (Shanxi).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university will significantly expand enrollment in Beijing to 36 students, with a ranking range of about 23108–24108. It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23000) can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science and Technology. Candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 24000) should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
